query:
-- Test Öğrencileri Oluştur (camelCase kullanarak)
INSERT INTO users (name, email, password, role, ageGroup, status, kvkkConsent, mentorId, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn)
VALUES 
  ('Test Öğrenci 1 (14-17)', 'test.ogrenci1@gmail.com', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdTq0dXbC', 'student', '14-17', 'pending', true, NULL, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  ('Test Öğrenci 2 (18-21)', 'test.ogrenci2@gmail.com', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdTq0dXbC', 'student', '18-21', 'pending', true, NULL, NOW(), NOW(), NOW()),
  ('Test Öğrenci 3 (22-24)', 'test.ogrenci3@gmail.com', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdTq0dXbC', 'student', '22-24', 'pending', true, NULL, NOW(), NOW(), NOW());

-- Test Mentor Oluştur
INSERT INTO users (name, email, password, role, status, kvkkConsent, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn)
VALUES 
  ('Test Mentor', 'test.mentor@gmail.com', '$2a$10$N9qo8uLOickgx2ZMRZoMyeIjZAgcfl7p92ldGxad68LJZdTq0dXbC', 'mentor', 'active', true, NOW(), NOW(), NOW());

-- Test Öğrencilerine Mentor Ata (mentor ID'yi al ve ata)
UPDATE users SET mentorId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'test.mentor@gmail.com' LIMIT 1) 
WHERE email IN ('test.ogrenci1@gmail.com', 'test.ogrenci2@gmail.com', 'test.ogrenci3@gmail.com');
